name: Model Version Changed — F1 Regression
failure_mode: Azure OpenAI model version pinning changes. New model version has lower extraction accuracy. F1 drops below baseline.
detection: Canary metric collection shows F1 delta < -0.05. gate_canary_regression fails.
remediation: 1. Roll back to stable revision. 2. Pin model version in deployment config. 3. Re-run canary with pinned version.
